name: Local SEO Audit
summary: Sure Cash Finance has 4 physical branches: Sydney (HQ), Gosford, Wollongong, and Tweed Heads. The SE Ranking data from init shows that the majority of tracked keyword rankings are in the local_pack (Google Business Profile / Maps results), NOT organic. This is the single most critical strategic finding: the business is competing primarily via GBP, not organic search.

gbp_analysis.critical_finding: SE Ranking positions are almost entirely local_pack type — not organic. This means: (1) the business's current 'SEO' wins are primarily GBP-driven, not website-driven; (2) any algorithm change to Maps/local pack could eliminate most tracked rankings; (3) organic SEO for the website is significantly underdeveloped relative to GBP performance.

branches.name: Sure Cash Finance — Sydney
branches.status: HQ location. GBP likely exists but Google review count (454+ reviews) suggests active GBP management.
branches.page_has_map: Unknown — WPBakery rendering prevents crawl confirmation

branches.name: Sure Cash Finance — Gosford
branches.status: Active branch. Top GSC page (456 clicks on OLD /gosford/ URL — now 404).
branches.page_has_phone: Gosford local number: 0265249210 found in homepage source

branches.name: Sure Cash Finance — Wollongong
branches.status: Active branch. 3rd GSC page (283 clicks on OLD /wollongong/ URL — now 404).

branches.name: Sure Cash Finance — Tweed Heads
branches.status: Active branch. 2nd GSC page (302 clicks on OLD /tweed-heads/ URL — now 404). Title tag has typo 'Headss'.

nap_consistency.phone_number_found: 1300 787 322 (1300 SURECASH) in header on all pages
nap_consistency.address_on_website: NO PHYSICAL ADDRESSES found on any page during crawl. This is a significant local SEO weakness — Google strongly recommends full NAP (Name, Address, Phone) on location pages.
nap_consistency.finding: The website does not display physical addresses for any of its 4 branches. Without visible NAP, Google cannot confirm address consistency between website and GBP listings. This is a local SEO gap even if the GBP listings are correct.

local_schema.local_business_schema: ABSENT from all pages — no LocalBusiness, FinancialService, or LoanOrMortgage schema found on any location page
local_schema.homepage_schema: WebSite + FAQPage only — no Organization or LocalBusiness schema
local_schema.impact: Without LocalBusiness schema on branch pages, Google cannot confirm structured branch data from the website. This weakens the site's co-citation signals for local pack rankings.

virtual_service_area_strategy.pages_count: ~26 virtual service area pages (cities without a physical branch)
virtual_service_area_strategy.duplicator_risk: These pages are 98%+ identical. Google's Quality Guidelines for local pages explicitly require unique, locally relevant content. Template-generated location pages are a known spam pattern.
virtual_service_area_strategy.google_maps_local_pack_eligibility: Surecash cannot appear in the local pack for cities where it has no physical branch. These virtual pages can only target organic results — and their thin duplicate content makes that very difficult.
virtual_service_area_strategy.recommendation: Prioritise content investment on the 4 real branch pages. For virtual areas: noindex the lowest-traffic pages, or invest in genuine local content (local financial counsellor resources, Centrelink office info, local demographics context) for the highest-potential virtual areas.

citation_building.citations_page: /citations/ page exists and is indexable — likely an internal tracking tool for citation submissions, should be noindexed
citation_building.brand_consistency: Brand name is 'Sure Cash Finance'. Google Business Profile likely listed under this name. Website title uses 'Sydney Fast Cash Loans | Sure Cash Finance' in some page titles — the 'Sydney Fast Cash Loans' sub-brand in meta titles could create inconsistency if GBP uses different name.

review_signals.google_reviews: 4.8 stars, 454+ reviews (shown in homepage footer widget). Strong.
review_signals.trustindex_widget: Present on homepage and about-us — Google reviews displayed via Trustindex
review_signals.review_response: Cannot assess from crawl whether business responds to reviews
review_signals.review_velocity: 454+ reviews over 25 years — consistent positive reputation
review_signals.notable_reviewers_in_content: Reviews mention team members: Paul, Sue, Val — personalises the brand

hyperlocal_content_gaps.gosford: No mention of specific Gosford suburbs served, local parking info, opening hours, or branch address on page
hyperlocal_content_gaps.wollongong: No mention of Wollongong CBD location, north/south Wollongong suburbs, branch-specific info
hyperlocal_content_gaps.tweed_heads: No mention of Gold Coast border location, QLD-adjacent service area, branch-specific info
hyperlocal_content_gaps.sydney: No mention of specific Sydney suburbs, HQ address, branch details

issues_priority.issue: No physical addresses on any branch location page
issues_priority.fix: Add full street address, suburb, state, postcode to Gosford, Wollongong, Tweed Heads, and Sydney pages

issues_priority.issue: No LocalBusiness schema on branch pages
issues_priority.fix: Add FinancialService/LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema to all 4 branch pages with full NAP + hours + geo coords
Add noindex meta robots or restrict access — it's an internal tracking page

issues_priority.issue: All tracked SE Ranking positions are local_pack, not organic
issues_priority.fix: Strategic implication: website organic SEO is underdeveloped. Prioritise building organic rankings alongside GBP maintenance.

issues_priority.issue: Branch pages have no opening hours
issues_priority.fix: Add opening hours to all 4 branch pages and in LocalBusiness schema

issues_priority.issue: No branch-specific phone numbers on Wollongong, Tweed Heads, Sydney pages
issues_priority.fix: Display direct branch phone numbers — supports local call tracking and NAP consistency

issues_priority.issue: 26+ virtual service area pages cannot appear in local pack
issues_priority.fix: Audit GSC data per virtual page. Noindex pages with <10 impressions/month. Keep only pages with genuine organic search demand.

issues_priority.issue: 'Sydney Fast Cash Loans' branding in page titles inconsistent with primary brand name
issues_priority.fix: Decide on primary brand and ensure consistency: use 'Sure Cash Finance' as brand name across all titles

issues_priority.issue: No Google Maps embed on location pages
issues_priority.fix: Embed Google Map for each branch location
